streams.readings: CREATE STREAM readings (deviceId string, temperature float, pm25 float, timestampUtc string) WITH (DATASOURCE="iot/smoke/readings", FORMAT="json")

rules.pm25_alert_rule: {"id":"pm25_alert_rule","sql":"SELECT deviceId, temperature, pm25, timestampUtc FROM readings WHERE pm25 >= 50","actions":[{"mqtt":{"server":"tcp://mosquitto:1883","topic":"iot/pm25/events","qos":1,"sendSingle":true,"dataTemplate":"{{toJson .}}"}}]}
